title: Floral Crunchy Lazy-Sunday Saudia Rose Water Stir-fry
description: A floral and crunchy dish perfect for a lazy Sunday breakfast featuring rose water to add a delicate and fragrant touch.

ingredients.name: Chicken Breast Fillets
ingredients.notes: Skin removed for a healthier dish

instructions: Whisk together the rose water and all-purpose flour in a bowl until well combined.
Slice the chicken fillets into thin strips.
In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add the garlic cloves, onion, celery sticks, paprika powder, and sesame seeds. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Dip each chicken strip in the rose water flour mixture to coat evenly.
Place coated chicken strips into the skillet with vegetables. Cook for an additional 3-4 minutes per side or until chicken is fully cooked through and golden brown on all sides.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
